changes.rationale: Challenge receipt-backed whole-system coverage, impact-graph linkage, critical paths, exclusions, and explicit write ownership without mutation authority.
Preserve the established diagnosis prompt while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Preserve bounded exploration guidance while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Require native edit permission mediation so writable implementation cannot bypass the runner-owned quality gate.
Preserve the gated learning workflow while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Require the runner-selected wide/deep context strategy, receipt-backed report, sufficiency decision, dossier gate, and final reconciliation before attestation.
Keep standard-lite bounded while requiring receipt-backed wide/deep context, sufficiency, dossier authorization, and final reconciliation for high or critical work.
Preserve read-only research guidance while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Preserve the read-only review workflow while provider options remain informational model configuration.
Allow bounded plan challenge and reviewer-grounded exact-diff reconciliation evidence without granting mutation capabilities or graph-completeness authority.
Require verification of context receipt, report, sufficiency, reconciliation, and exact changed-path bindings while preserving the verifier read-only boundary.
Require exact debugging evidence while preventing credentials, private paths, PII, and raw production payloads from being shared or persisted.
Extend semantic release review to the complete Milestone 2 workflow, producer, receipt, and same-run provenance contract.
Align computational Engineering Dossier risk classes with schema and constants while preserving the legacy operational trace label.
Make reviewer decomposition mode-aware: serialized in instrumented quality sessions and only optionally parallel in profile-only guidance.
Add the focused receipt-backed wide and deep analysis procedure, fallback rules, stopping criteria, and final blast-radius reconciliation for high or critical work.
